title: Join a Test Meeting | Zoom
excerpt: Preview your next Zoom Meeting using out test meeting tool to check your settings and display.
content_html:
Test your internet connection by joining a test meeting.

Join Meeting Test

Test your internet and device settings by joining a test meeting

Join

If you are unable to join the meeting, visit Zoom Support Center for useful information.
